course_title: THE THEORY OF SINGLE VARIABLE CALCULUS
description: Covers material in first and second semester calculus but it is intended to teach math majors to write and understand proofs in mathematics in general and in calculus in particular.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: MATH 234or graduate/professional standing or member of the Pre-Masters Mathematics (Visiting International) Program

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: MATH 234or graduate/professional standing or member of the Pre-Masters Mathematics (Visiting International) Program
